name: delinea_secret_server
explanation: Delinea Secret Server is a vendor security marketplace tile with no Agent metric check. The spec exposes only a `logs` template (TCP/UDP syslog ingestion at a user-supplied port) and the `datadog_checks/delinea_secret_server/` package contains no `.py` check implementation. The integration is realized end-to-end by configuring Delinea Secret Server to forward syslog to the Agent. There is no host/port/endpoint or service to autodiscover from the Agent side.
notes: Logs-only marketplace tile (pattern N variant: syslog-receive-only). Same rationale as delinea_privilege_manager.
